examples.title: Algorithm: Demand Paging
examples.description: Demonstrates the steps involved in demand paging
examples.code:
ALGORITHM DemandPaging
INPUT: pageTable, pageNumber
OUTPUT: frameNumber

BEGIN
 IF pageTable[pageNumber].valid THEN
 RETURN pageTable[pageNumber].frameNumber
 ELSE
 RAISE pageFaultException
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps involved in demand paging. It checks if the requested page is valid and in memory. If it is, it returns the frame number. If not, it raises a page fault exception.

examples.title: Python: Demand Paging Simulation
examples.description: Simulates demand paging with a simple page table
examples.explanation: This Python code simulates a simple page table with 10 entries. It demonstrates how to set a page as valid and how to handle page faults when accessing invalid pages.

examples.explanation: This C code simulates a simple page table with 10 entries. It demonstrates how to set a page as valid and how to handle page faults when accessing invalid pages.
